title: Discharge temperature protection threshold
summary: Discharge temperature protection triggers above 130°C, resets below 90°C after 3 minutes stop.
evidence_quote: 连续30秒检测到排气温度高于 130℃时...压缩机停足3分钟后，若排气温度小于90℃时，系统恢复运行
rejection_reason: evidence_quote not found in any chunk

title: Anti-freeze protection trigger
summary: Anti-freeze protection triggers when evaporator temperature ≤ -2°C for 3 minutes, resets at ≥10°C after 3 minutes stop.
evidence_quote: 当连续3分钟检测到T蒸≤-2℃时...当压缩机停了3分钟且T蒸≥10℃时，指示停止闪烁，消除故障代码
rejection_reason: evidence_quote not found in any chunk
